programme.desc: A boy, born into a family of varying religions, finds himself embroiled in communal riots. Soon, his mother's death becomes an issue raised to fulfil political agendas.

programme.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programme.desc: An honest man turns to crime to avenge his father's death and ends up being a don in Mumbai. He has to fight with enemies, former allies and a corrupt police officer.

programme.desc: Simran helps her best friend, Rohan, win over the girl he likes, Preeti. However, trouble ensues when Simran gets pregnant and Rohan is forced to marry her.

programme.desc: Mangal Pandey and William Gordon become friends during a war in Afghanistan. But when the East India Company introduces a rifle that uses objectionable cartridges, Mangal Pandey rises in revolt.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: A family move in to their new house unaware of the fact that the house is inhabited by a ghost. It is learnt the ghost is not too happy with his new housemates.

programme.desc: Mumbai of 1980s is terrorised by a serial killer who ruthlessly kills pavement dwellers in their sleep. A suspended police officer then decides to step in and conduct an investigation.

programme.desc: Pooja gets married to Suraj but feels guilty for separating him from Supriya, his former fiancee. When Suraj learns the truth he abandons her, oblivious to the fact that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum
programme.desc: Rahul is told by a street astrologer that he will find his soul-mate in a girl who has a birthmark on her right breast. Urmila Martodkar walks into his life, birthmark and all. But what they don’t know is that she is not a girl, but is a gay boy.

programme.title: Lucky: No Time for Love

programme.desc: When Duck and Frog get a job in a restaurant kitchen, Frog accidentally makes the soup incredibly spicy. He wants to serve it to a celebrity chef, but Duck wants to stop him!

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck is a tour guide at a grand stately home, and Frog thinks it's so nice that he decides to move in. When he gets annoyed by the tourists, Frog dresses up as a ghost to scare them off.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Odd Squad investigates strange events. The agents try to escape from a time loop.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Pieface is secretly doing underpants laundry chores for Walter, hoping to help Dennis save up some cash. He urges the gang to audition for a replacement Pieface to make up for his mysterious absence.

programme.desc: Learn about the weather, how it's recorded, and how it affects us.

programme.title: One Zoo Three
programme.desc: The One Zoo Three brothers meet the zoo’s shyest animals as Cam is challenged to a game of spot the reptile, and Tyler tries to tempt Rambutan the binturong onto his new platform.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Jo Brand joins Rattus for a special NHS 75th birthday show, looking at how it was created, some of its weirder moments, and what life was like before it was created.

programme.title: DIY Deadly with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: In this unprecedented time of lockdown there has never been a better time to learn about the wildlife around us, and Deadly 60 fans have been sending in their videos, photos and questions for Steve Backshall to answer. In this episode Steve explores our aerial assassins, and judging by CBBC’s most observant viewers, the skies above us are home to a huge variety of deadly animals! Steve unravels the mysteries of a bird nest and a feather collection, explains that kites are spreading far and wide, and how to bring birds to your bird table without making them dinner themselves! In a DIY demo, Steve then shows us how to make fat ball dessert for our feathered friends, before basking in butterfly, bee and wasp glory! But that’s not all. The audience gets their chance to Beat Backshall in a 60 second quickfire round. The question is, how many can Steve get right before his time is up? In a fun-filled, fast and furious 13 minutes, we’ll also get to see some of the best bits from 13 years of deadly exploration. In this episode Steve gets hunted down by a silent forest predator, and catches the world’s biggest and most feisty wasp!

programme.title: Art Ninja
programme.desc: Ricky crafts mini masterpieces, is set challenges by viewers, creates dynamic DIY animations and then gets out and about on his trusty skateboard to make epic art with a ninja twist! Meanwhile, Ricky's latest art creations are a fish bat and ball, a catapult inspired by Leonardo da Vinci and some epic art with remote control toys and plenty of horsepower.

programme.title: Hey You What If?

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs with Steve Backshall

Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders. He meets the armoured tank that is Nodosaurus, tests whether an Iguanodon really has what it takes to beat a T rex and thanks to some mega-engineering, unleashes an Ankylosaurus tail-swinging robot that goes on the rampage and then some!

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Charles Darwin presents a special show, as Horrible Histories takes a timely look at our planet and how we’ve behaved towards it throughout history. We look at how we’ve not always treated the planet's resources with the utmost care, from the 19th-century gold rush, to Henry VIII enjoying a little too much deforestation to build his warships In The Gone Show, we meet a range of animals that have recently become extinct, and we see how mankind has tried to work with and shape the land, from the earliest guides to farming to the fabulous Gardens of Versailles In Historical Educating, head teacher Mrs Thomas has trouble with her geography supply teachers (a Greek philosopher and a Viking), who seem intent on telling their pupils that the Earth is not round. We reveal that plastic bags were originally invented to save the planet, and in Time Beefs, Judge Rinder settles a dispute between environmentalist Rachel Carson and the businessmen who tried to stop her.

programme.title: DIY Deadly with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: In this unprecedented time of lockdown there has never been a better time to learn about the wildlife around us, and Deadly 60 fans have been sending in their videos, photos and questions for Steve Backshall to answer. In this episode Steve focuses on our woodland wildlife, which hides some of our most fascinating and secretive animals. And judging by CBBC’s most observant viewers, our forests packed full of deadly animals! Steve explores why bees swarm, explains how bizarre bugs feed, and revels in the antics of a snuffling Badger! In a DIY demo, Steve then shows us how to catch Britain’s most secretive animals on film by using a camera trap! But that’s not all. The audience gets their chance to Beat Backshall in a 60 second quickfire round. The question is, how many can Steve get right before his time is up? In a fun-filled, fast and furious 13 minutes, we’ll also get to see some of the best bits from 13 years of deadly exploration. Steve gets stung by killer bees and gets a bit too close a south African Badger that’s armed with serious attitude!

programme.title: Art Ninja
programme.desc: Ricky crafts mini masterpieces, is set challenges by viewers, creates dynamic DIY animations and then gets out and about on his trusty skateboard to make epic art with a ninja twist! Gavin brings round his new pet, Spider, and Ricky is terrified. After making butterfly art inspired by Damien Hirst and weaving a ninja rug, Ricky has to run for his life when Spider escapes. Once in the woods, to try and overcome his fear, Ricky makes a sculpture with items he finds on the forest floor.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.desc: Flying like a superhero may sound like enormous fun, but there are some serious downsides that Hollywood does not tell you about - weather, extreme cold and even fizzy blood.

programme.title: BBC Live Lessons
programme.desc: Join presenters Ade Adepitan and Megan McCubbin to learn about climate change. Find out what it is, why it’s happening and how to make everyday choices that help to reduce our carbon emissions. We’re going on a musical mission to put on a planet-friendly gig for band manager Hacker T Dog’s new signing, The Low-Carbon Legends. Along the way, we share a fun science experiment, make low-carbon event planning choices, and write song lyrics inspired by what we learn. Young gig producers across the UK share their climate-conscious ideas, and we hear from community gardener Tayshan Hayden-Smith and clothes designer Claudine Rousseau to discover how to help protect our planet in creative, collaborative and earth-kind ways. And, last but definitely not least, get ready to rock out during an outstanding unplugged performance from The Low-Carbon Legends.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: Did you know your body is full of crystals? Say hello to new Oucher Anneeka, join Dr Dan as he goes on duty in a breathlessness clinic, and prepare for a huge medical discovery in Time Machine as the Cupboard of Everything heads into the past. programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: In this special episode of Deadly 60, Steve Backshall takes a deep dive into the fate of one of the most extraordinary, and endangered, ecosystems on our planet: coral reefs. They may cover less than one per cent of the ocean floor, but they support roughly a quarter of all marine life and are irreplaceable - yet they are in serious trouble. Steve travels to some of the world’s most celebrated reef systems, from the shallows of the Java Sea to the tropical waters of the Maldives. Along the way, he meets all the weird and wonderful creatures that call the reef home, including some of the best-camouflaged creatures and some impressive apex predators - he even gets a telling-off from a clownfish!

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Charles Darwin presents a special show, as Horrible Histories takes a timely look at our planet and how we’ve behaved towards it throughout history. We look at how we’ve not always treated the planet's resources with the utmost care, from the 19th-century gold rush, to Henry VIII enjoying a little too much deforestation to build his warships In The Gone Show, we meet a range of animals that have recently become extinct, and we see how mankind has tried to work with and shape the land, from the earliest guides to farming to the fabulous Gardens of Versailles In Historical Educating, head teacher Mrs Thomas has trouble with her geography supply teachers (a Greek philosopher and a Viking), who seem intent on telling their pupils that the Earth is not round. We reveal that plastic bags were originally invented to save the planet, and in Time Beefs, Judge Rinder settles a dispute between environmentalist Rachel Carson and the businessmen who tried to stop her.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out

programme.title: Springtime on the Farm
programme.desc: Jules Hudson is introduced to Big Red, a cow whose newborn calf needs urgent help to get off to the best possible start. We visit a dairy farm where four generations have combined traditional values with cutting-edge technology. Here, cows choose when they want to be milked, guided by smart collars and advanced robotic systems. And Rob and Dave Nicholson head to Scotland with a major decision to make, as they consider investing in a prized Highland heifer. (Concludes tomorrow.) Exec Prod: Mark McMullen; Senior Prod/Dir: Adam Caldow; Prods/Dirs: Tom Goddard/Jacob Hesmondhalgh; Daisybeck Studios (S9 Ep3/4)

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Fifty-three-year-old Richard is blue-lighted in with shortness of breath and chest pains. He has a condition called atrial fibrillation and his heart is beating abnormally fast. A woman arriving for a hospital appointment has fallen down the escalator. Eighty-four-year-old Sylvia is taken straight to resus to be urgently assessed and treated. Farmer Duncan, 42, has been crushed by one of his herd of bulls. And in the Paediatrics Department, 14-year-old Poppy comes in with a nasty gash on her chin. Series Prod: Kayleigh Smith; Prods/Dirs: Anna Evans/Matt Lees; Exec Prods: Kerry Brierley/Elaine Hackett; Crackit Productions Limited (S10 Ep6/6)

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to the Malvern Hills, Worcestershire, to face one of her toughest challenges: 24-year-old landlord Hendrik who's never worked behind a bar in his life. Alex finds him struggling to assert himself, with a menu priced by guesswork and a beer garden that's more eyesore than asset. Despite his parents' help, the family dynamic is fractured, with Hendrik unable to lead his parents. Communication is breaking down and time is running out. Alex sets out to transform both the pub - from stripping back the clutter to overhauling the food offer - and the landlord. She knows that Hendrik needs more than business advice - he needs to find his voice and step up as a leader. Exec Prod: Rachel Innes-Lumsden; Prod/Dir: Imogen Willcocks; Series Prod: Ruth Binsley (S21 Ep6)

programme.title: Snatched

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Driving Big Dummy: Animated comedy. Bob and Teddy go on a road trip to get a new sink for the restaurant and drop off a ventriloquist dummy head for a mini-golf sculpture collector. [S,AD] S12 Ep4

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. The boys meet a new neighbour - a weatherman - as Marcus uses the forecast of a small tremor to bring excitement to his relationship with Delphine, Stylax tries his luck with an attractive new colleague, and Grumio discovers Indian food.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Chocolate Showdown
programme.desc: An ooey-gooey, decadent chocolate dessert competition series where 10 home bakers go head-to-head in the indulgent world of chocolate for a 50,000-dollar grand prize. As the finale approaches, only four bakers remain for a 3D chocolate moulding Technique Test that gives them one last chance to impress the judges and secure their spot in the final three - at the same time, one baker is given the opportunity of a lifetime after they boldly reimagine a chocolate bar.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA
programme.desc: The American version of the competitive cookery series where chef Gordon Ramsay brings his expert knowledge and unique leadership style to a search for the next great food and beverage industry entrepreneur. The contestants showcase their market awareness and customer service skills in a challenge where they are split into two teams and tasked with running a pop-up coffee shop in downtown Seattle.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show that explores luxury listings in majestic mountain ranges, sprawling beaches, and glittering urban skylines. Top estate agent Kash Guha is tasked with delivering a home on a budget of between two to four million dollars for Richard, whose wish list for his dream property is simple: it has to be on a certain street on the West Side of Manhattan and it has to have a view of the Hudson River.

programme.title: Georgia & Tommy: Baby Steps
programme.desc: The beginning of the fourth series of the reality programme following Tommy and Georgia - TOWIE'S favourite couple - on their journey in parenthood and all the joy, tears, stress and magical moments that go with it. In this episode, the pair are excited to share the news of their second pregnancy with their family, but they encounter problems early on in the pregnancy that results in heartbreaking news.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Gatsby encourages Dean to clear the air with Chloe Sims after not hearing from her since their date, but then Dean discovers Chloe spent the weekend with a younger man. Amber realises why Dan is refusing to commit to her. Trying to help, Yaz suggests a relationship counsellor for Dan and Amber. Arg learns that he needs to face the consequences of his actions, and Jordan faces the wrath of Myles after his efforts to comfort a freshly single Courtney blows up in his face.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Moving Up and Moving On: Kenya takes her separation from Marc a step further. Cynthia considers moving to LA. Porsha and Dennis fall out over their living arrangements. [S] S12 Ep21

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: The Italian Invasion: US reality series. Melissa hosts a Boujie Kidz pop-up for Danielle, and the Housewives take a trip to Ireland for Teresa's bachelorette party. [S] S13 Ep10

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Ant and Dec host the quiz that gives contestants a chance to win the biggest cash prize in British TV history - every question is an opportunity to climb an endless money ladder and reach the big money, but only a correct answer banks the cash. Push their luck too far and contestants will crash out of the game and lose it all - packed with drama, jeopardy and real emotion, it's quite literally the biggest prize ever conceived. In this episode, Zee and his dad Tony return to take on the Limitless money ladder, but how high will they dare to climb?

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the series enters its final week, the campmates feel the pressure. With another elimination on the horizon, discover who remains with the chance of becoming a Legend. [S,AD] S2 Ep11

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the classic game show which asks viewers and contestants to say what they see - this time sees Sophie, Richard and Linda compete to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues, but only one of them will go through to the Super Catchphrase for the chance to win 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's the series finale, but the Essex drama shows no signs of packing up for the summer. Arg's behaviour pushes Gemma to breaking point. Jordan's friends give him the cold shoulder when he sticks to his principles. Myles gives Courtney an ultimatum. Dan struggles to commit to Amber while Chloe has doubts about her relationship with Adam. And Tommy is thrown a birthday party fit for a king.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the series enters its final week, the campmates feel the pressure. With another elimination on the horizon, discover who remains with the chance of becoming a Legend. [S,AD] S2 Ep11

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. Ampika is back with a bang - including a 7 year vendetta! Paige is struggling after her house renovation spirals hundreds of thousands over budget. Meanwhile, Seema is harbouring a big secret that could devastate the group... and a surprising speech leaves Sheena dumbfounded!

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Stella's cat dies, Preston informs Peter about his new bereavement leave policy covering pets - however, when Peter then takes in an 80-year-old German-speaking scarlet macaw that he calls Gonzo, it soon emerges that the bird has a dark past. Meanwhile, Brian self-publishes a book and gives Stewie an autographed copy, but he is hurt when his best friend subsequently gives the book to a sharing library.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Following a relaxing family vacation in Nantucket, Lois discovers that she has been banned from the Airbnb app due to a poor review citing a stolen object - when everyone else says that they stole nothing, Lois eventually finds out that she mistakenly stole a fancy shampoo bottle. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian discover saltwater taffy on the trip and decide to buy it in bulk and sell it door-to-door back in Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Arriving late at The Drunken Clam, Peter explains a sad story about Chris, who has recently having to break up with his first love in the form of a blind girl who mistook him for Colin Farrell, to the guys - this then prompts the others to recall their own first love experiences in ways that seem awfully similar to the plots of three classic films, namely Cast Away, Dirty Dancing, and When Harry Met Sally...

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series about the escapades of Stan Smith, an extreme right-wing CIA agent dealing with family life and keeping America safe in the most absurd way possible. Steve and his school friends attempt to become more popular by taking up witchcraft, and Stan and Klaus spend their time remembering bands from the '90s.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about a CIA man who is constantly on the alert for terrorism. When Hayley and Jeff announce that they are trying for a baby, Stan gets upset at the thought of becoming a grandfather - meanwhile, Steve and Klaus are inducted into a drug gang.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Stuck in the Kitchen with You: Animated comedy. Bob gets roped into doing the cooking for an old people's home's Thanksgiving dinner while the kids improvise a holiday parade. [S,AD] S12 Ep8

programme.title: Bob's Burgers

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Sitcom set in a fictional police training college. The new Head of Training is set to be announced, Paul's life is about to get even more stressful, and Steph and Mike might be getting back together.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. The boys respond in their own ways following a catastrophic industrial accident - Marcus immediately seeks financial compensation while Grumio prefers to 'go to seed' at home, but a cheery out-of-work builder called Jason then steps into their lives...

Teamwork gets tossed into the wok as the chefs face a high-pressure Chinese cuisine tag team challenge, but not everyone's ready to play nice - the heat then gets even hotter during a star-studded charity night dinner service benefiting Feeding America and Stand Up to Cancer. With each cook taking a turn running a course, the kitchen turns into a battlefield of egos, misfires, and shaky leadership.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. A proud Brian shows Stewie and Chris a hole he dug in the backyard where Rupert is revealed to be buried - while giving him a bath, Stewie discovers a Made in China tag on Rupert's back and realises that their relationship is multicultural. When Stewie suspects that Rupert wants him to meet his family for real, Stewie and Brian find the factory where Rupert was made but are mistaken for American spies.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter signs up to take the place of the retiring Pawtucket Brewery's nightwatchman - when a drunk Principal Shepherd bribes him with cash to let him and his fellow principals steal some beer, Peter decides to turn the brewery into an after-hours bar. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian find a lost dog poster with a big cash reward and exploit Brian's similarity to the missing pooch to try to claim the reward.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter is sent out on a Father's Day scavenger hunt with Joe, Cleveland and Quagmire under the supervision of Principal Sheperd - after finding clues at Goodwill and Ernie the Giant Chicken's mansion, the hunt leads them to Wild West's ranch, where they find him preparing for a showdown with his absentee father Old West as he does every year - when Old West arrives to make amends, his son refuses to hear him out.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy series. When Klaus gets sick, Stan baulks at paying the high cost to save his life. Klaus steals Stan's SUV and gets the CIA to transfer his brain into the SUV's navigation computer. Meanwhile, Steve and his friends are terrorised by Roger after they play a prank on one of his personas.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series about the escapades of Stan Smith, an extreme right-wing CIA agent dealing with family life and keeping America safe in the most absurd way possible. programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. The final seven chefs go head-to-head for one of five coveted black jackets, the key to advancing in the competition, as WWE champions Braun Strowman, Liv Morgan and Big E kick things off by challenging the chefs to create a dish that best represents their home state - those who don't advance must redeem themselves with a signature twist on pizza, while the final three face a high-stakes challenge that puts their creativity to the test.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Lois grows concerned about Chris' health, she has him sign up for sports with Principal Shepherd's help - however, Chris can't get the hang of any until his bowels act up and unintentionally reveal his talent for speed walking as he hurries to the bathroom. Meanwhile, Brian's barking loudly to warn neighbours about a pack of coyotes on Spooner Street causes Quagmire to file a police report about the barking.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Faith Alexander arrives in Midsomer Deverell to meet her long-lost uncle Rex Masters, but Rex has told everyone that Faith's entire family was wiped out in a plane crash and he has disappeared - thanks to Miles King, an old friend who does Rex's gardening, news spreads quickly as Rex's cook Eileen Carnack, cleaner Janet Bailey, and Janet's fiance Jeremy Thacker rush to his home at Stonecroft House. Faith is anxious and can't understand how Rex has photographs of her when they haven't met following a 40-year family feud - after Barnaby asks Jones to investigate the disappearance, Rex's body is found in a river below Crofter's Weir. As Barnaby returns to Rex's study and finds some important clues in a set of risque photographs from the 1960s, can he get to the bottom of the tangled relationships stretching across the generations, learn the truth about Rex's life of mischief-making, and identify the killer?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is called out to the banks of the River Tyne, where the body of a young woman has been washed up - although a popular manager at a local green energy company, a loyal friend and a loving mother and wife, Vera uncovers a web of intrigue, betrayal and lost promises as she has to unravel the victim's complicated personal and professional lives to find her killer.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part crime thriller. What lies behind the door of number 27 The Hill? A routine 'domestic' call-out to this house leads to a policeman's murder, a grievous injury to the prime suspect for the murder, and the location of a shocking discovery. All of these events will add up to the most difficult case of DCI Alan Banks's life - five young girls have gone missing and he has just discovered the lair of a serial rapist and killer, but only four bodies are found. This means that one victim - Leanne Wray - could still be alive... however, with suspect Marcus Payne in a coma, the ambitious DS Annie Cabbot from Professional Standards wants to know why. As Banks pursues his line of investigation, she must therefore tail him every step of the way...

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part pilot case of the crime drama. The suspected murderer Marcus Payne dies without regaining consciousness, but his wife Lucy recovers from the injuries caused by her husband - Banks must find the missing Leanne Wray in the meantime, but time is against him and he is hindered by DS Annie Cabbot, who wants to spend time investigating the now-suspicious death of the killer. Banks knows that Payne must have had an accomplice and he questions Lucy, only for her to flirt with Banks and play him emotionally - Banks decides to take her in for questioning on the grounds of being involved with the rape and murder of the four girls and the disappearance of Leanne. However, when things gets complicated after Lucy's background and true identity is revealed, there's another question to be answered - can a victim also be guilty of a crime?

Can the detective pick up the trail of clues to lead him to the killer?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is called to a remote lighthouse when the body of a man is discovered in a sailboat - despite the difficulties of the scene, Vera immediately sets about her investigation. Vera learns that the body is local council enforcement officer and experienced amateur sailor Frank Channing, a family man with strong friendships and who was well respected at work... surely this really was just an accident? As Vera looks into Frank's life, she finds that he perhaps wasn't the diligent and dedicated worker everyone said he was - and that maybe his facade of being a happy-go-lucky family man had started to crack. It's starting to look like Frank was also seriously out of his depth and messing with things that many people would rather he left alone - had Frank started to pick at things that caused murder to unravel? Vera and her team piece together Frank's final days and soon discover that his life wasn't plain sailing.

Meanwhile, Banks investigates when a teenage girl's body is found in an alleyway in Eastvale - how did the killer get there without being seen?

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: The 14th entry in the James Bond film series and the last to star Roger Moore as the secret agent. When James Bond is sent to investigate a security leak at high-tech company Zorin Industries, he discovers a hotbed of murder and deception - Max Zorin, the company's mysterious owner has devised a plan to corner the world's microchip market... even if he has to kill millions to do it. Before Bond can stop Zorin, he must confront the madman's beautiful and deadly companion May Day - with help from geologist Stacey Sutton, Bond launches an all-out assault on Zorin's deadly scheme that concludes with a treacherous duel on the upper spans of the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A troubled teen learns discipline and courage through martial arts training, finding purpose and respect under an unconventional mentor.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: In the resort of the monsters where humans are banned, Dracula must do everything to keep his daughter from falling in love with a human!

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: Alice wakes up to find that Raccoon city is infested with zombies and monsters. Later, she tries her best to find a way out of the city before it is too late.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six people are captured in a perilous game of escape rooms. To survive, they must team up with two original survivors, but as the rounds go, they wonder if this is a game they've been through before.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles travels the multiverse with Gwen, teaming up with Spider-People to fight the villain Spot while facing multiverse dangers and complex rules in this epic adventure.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: When an ex-soldier who discovers gold in the Lapland wilderness tries to take the loot into the city, Nazi soldiers led by a brutal SS officer battle him.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: A shrewd young man and a masterful treasure hunter put aside their differences to find a lost ancient fortune dating back 500 years.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Captain Artemis and her soldiers are pulled into a world where dangerous monsters and humans co-exist. They must escape with the help from a hunter.

programme.title: The Unholy
programme.desc: The Unholy is a supernatural horror about a deaf girl who, after a visit from a spirit she believes to be the Virgin Mary, suddenly speaks and heals others, but dark, sinister forces are at play.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: A dating consultant who makes a living teaching men to woo women, finds that his game doesn't work with the columnist he is smitten with.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: Ryder and his men hijack a subway train in Manhattan and demand a ransom of 10 million dollars.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A random taxi chat after leaving the airport grows important. The passenger and driver see their lives differently now, realizing these meetings happen for a reason.

programme.desc: Manny, Sid, and Diego join everybody for a journey to higher ground as the Ice Age is coming to an end, but discover that Manny is not the last mammoth.

programme.title: Master Z The IP Man Legacy
programme.desc: A martial artist decides to lay low following his humiliating loss to the famous Ip Man. However, various circumstances put him in the cross hairs of a powerful drug smuggler of foreign descent.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Catch all the cool promos, music, and fillers from your favorite movies and shows, streaming back-to-back! It's the perfect way to enjoy non-stop entertainment in one go.

programme.title: Operation Red Sea
programme.desc: A Chinese special forces unit must rescue their fellow citizens in the country of Yewaire on the Arabian Peninsula amidst violent coup and threats from a terrorist group.

programme.title: Catch The Dragon
programme.desc: Catch The Dragon showcases action, heroism, and martial arts adventure, delivering cinematic thrills and engaging combat sequences.

programme.title: A Knight'S War
programme.desc: A legendary warrior rises during a brutal medieval war where kingdoms clash and loyalty is tested. Armed with courage and strategy, he must face powerful enemies to defend his land.

programme.title: Cars 3
programme.desc: Lighting McQueen, a legendary racer, is overcome by new generation racers. He sets out to prove that he is the best racer in the world with the help of Cruz Ramirez.

programme.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
programme.desc: The Grand Budapest Hotel delivers quirky comedy, intricate plots, and visually rich storytelling, blending humor and artistic style.

programme.title: Alice In Wonderland (2010)
programme.desc: Mia Wasikowska, Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter. 19-year-old Alice returns to the magical world from her childhood adventure, where she reunites with her old friends and learns of her true destiny.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: Korean authorities are on the hunt for a suspect linked to an online threat, who is now on a flight heading to the U.S. Stay tuned for updates!

programme.title: Eragon
programme.desc: After Saphira hatches for Eragon, King Galbatorix sends his servants after them, in an effort to capture or kill them.

programme.title: Brave
programme.desc: Brave revisits the fantasy adventure of courage, self-discovery, and familial bonds, inspiring viewers with rich storytelling and visuals.

programme.title: Glass
programme.desc: Glass blends psychological suspense, mystery, and character-driven drama, keeping audiences engaged with tension and unexpected twists.

programme.title: Bolt
programme.desc: A TV star dog named Bolt thinks he has powers. Lost from the studio, he teams with Mittens the cat and Rhino the hamster to find home, learns reality.

programme.title: Stinky Summer
programme.desc: The movie name is yet to be announced by the channel.

programme.title: Kunlun Battle
programme.desc: After the Kunlun gatekeeper is betrayed and ruined by his own people, his son joins forces with a shark man to fight their way back into Kunlun and avenge his father.

programme.title: Unbending Mr. Fang
programme.desc: After learning martial arts, Fong Sai-yuk comes back to Zhaoqing and gets immediately involved in a corruption case. The Governor of Nine Gates is ordered to lead a squad to kill witnesses

programme.title: Ooops! Noah Is Gone.
programme.desc: Dave and son Finny, Nestrians, aim to board Noah's Ark to escape flood but discover they're not on the allowed animals list.

programme.title: Guardians The Superheroes
programme.desc: A diverse team of gifted heroes assembles to protect the world from supernatural threats. Their unique powers, courage, and unity forge an epic, action-packed adventure.

programme.title: The Princess Diaries
programme.desc: A shy teenager discovers she's heir to a European throne. With awkward charm and royal lessons, she navigates transformation, etiquette, romance, and acceptance of destiny.

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express (2017)
programme.desc: When a murder occurs on the train on which he's travelling, celebrated detective Hercule Poirot is recruited to solve the case.

programme.title: Gremlin
programme.desc: A man receives a cryptic box holding a gruesome monster that will annihilate his loved ones. To stop the destruction, he has to pass the box to someone dear to him.

programme.title: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: Romcom with Julia Roberts and Richard Gere. A business trip leads to a chance encounter.

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: After five years of imprisonment, a thief teams up with his partner to conduct a heist in Europe. However, a French detective starts pursuing them.

programme.title: Ice Age: Dawn Of The Dinosaurs
programme.desc: When Sid's attempt to adopt three dinosaur eggs gets him abducted by their real mother to an underground lost world his friends attempt to rescue him.

programme.title: Cruella
programme.desc: Ambitious Estella transforms into daring Cruella, challenging fashion icon Baroness while chasing fame and revenge.

programme.title: Journey To The West:Conquering The Demon
programme.desc: Demon hunter Tang Sanzang seeks the Monkey King's help to defeat a pig demon.

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: When Blu, a domesticated macaw, meets the fiercely independent Jewel, he takes off on an adventure to Rio de Janeiro with this bird of his dreams.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: When his youthful ambition leads to a tragic marriage, the all-powerful Samson embarks on a quest for vengeance that brings him into direct conflict with the Philistine army.

programme.title: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Ferdinand revisits themes of courage, friendship, and identity, offering family-friendly comedy and heartfelt emotional moments.

programme.title: Planet Of The Apes
programme.desc: When astronaut Taylor's spaceship crashes on an unknown planet, he realises that it is ruled by apes more advanced than humans.

programme.title: Coolie
programme.desc: Orphaned by a flood, Iqbal becomes a railway coolie. Haunted by memories, he searches endlessly for his mother, believing each arriving train may bring her back.

programme.title: Maine Pyar Kiya
programme.desc: Prem and Suman's love faces tough challenges when family pressures and expectations come into play. Can their bond withstand the storms, or will love be overshadowed by family drama?

programme.title: Aadmi
programme.desc: After his entire family is slaughtered and he's framed, one man's search for truth uncovers a shocking conspiracy that leads him into the heart of a national-level power game.

programme.title: Loafer
programme.desc: Ravi, an unemployed man known for brawling, is wrongly accused of killing a gangster. Abandoned by his family, he must battle alone to clear his name and prove his innocence.

programme.title: Kyon Ki...Its Fate
programme.desc: Tanvi and Anand find themselves unexpectedly falling in love due to their unique circumstances, navigating the ups and downs of their relationship while discovering deep connections along the way.

programme.title: Ghayal Once Again
programme.desc: When a video of his mentor's murder surfaces, an investigative journalist takes action to find those responsible.

programme.title: Sanam
programme.desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.

programme.title: 23 March 1931 Shaheed
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of his mentor Lala Lajpat Rai by British authorities, Bhagat Singh seeks vengeance, ultimately leading to his death sentence for killing a British official.

programme.title: Gambler
programme.desc: Though Inspector Dayashanker is lazy, he unwittingly unearths a criminal conspiracy and becomes the pride of his division overnight. However, the local gangsters turn his life into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
programme.desc: Arun, a talented singer, gains fame for Seema's lyrics, though they've never met. When they finally meet, their encounter unravels unexpected emotions, leading to a deep connection between them.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: Babu, a hardened criminal, reforms his life after rescuing a baby from a train crash and raising him as his son. But peace is short-lived as his dark past resurfaces to haunt him.

programme.title: Muqadama
programme.desc: Ajit's world shatters when his wife dies after a horrific crime. His quest for revenge leads to bloodshed, but the law catches up, sentencing him to hang for his actions.

programme.title: Ram Teri Ganga Maili
programme.desc: Narendra marries Ganga, but when he mysteriously disappears, she takes matters into her own hands and sets off on an adventurous quest to find her missing husband.

programme.title: Mard Ki Zabaan
programme.desc: Bujji is set to marry the daughter of a powerful politician. Their struggle begins when things fall apart due to unpleasant circumstances.

programme.title: Kasoor
programme.desc: Shekhar hires Simran as lawyer, she falls for him, unaware of his intentions.

programme.title: Taaqat
programme.desc: A group of commandos seek revenge as Brigadier Singha, the Chief of Indian Army, is killed by Dong, a ruthless terrorist.

programme.title: Maha Sangram
programme.desc: Vishal, a farmer, sends his brother, Arjun, to the city for higher education. However, when Arjun falls in love with a girl in the city and gets murdered by her father, Vishal seeks revenge.

programme.title: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
programme.desc: An ambitious youth who goes to the US to try his luck is caught in a love triangle with a luckless friend and a spoilt, rich kid.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: After striking it rich with a lottery win, Namdev's friend betrays him by framing him for murder. Now, Namdev must clear his name and seek justice. What a twist!

programme.title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
programme.desc: Balwant seeks revenge after his brother's death, slipping into crime. His children, heartbroken by his change, take it upon themselves to stop him and restore the man they once knew.

programme.title: Muqabla
programme.desc: Two brothers find themselves jobs in the police department, when difference arise between them personally and professionally.

programme.title: Hatya
programme.desc: Sagar helps a street boy, unaware of the storm ahead. When the boy's mother is found murdered, Sagar becomes the prime suspect, forced to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: In a twist of fate, Yash kills Raja out of love but finds himself reborn years later. Now, he encounters an older version of himself, sparking unexpected memories and emotions.

programme.title: Kabzaa (1988)
programme.desc: Ravi's heart changes after Ali saves him, leading him to fight Veljibhai.

programme.title: Maharaja
programme.desc: Kohinoor is back to reclaim his kingdom, but things get messy when Ranbir kidnaps his nanny. Can Kohinoor rescue her and secure his throne? Adventure awaits!

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: Starring: Ishan,Mannara Chopra. A young man, shuffling between two jobs, falls for the commissioner's sister, Anjali, who betrays him. After finishing his time behind bars, he meets another girl named, Anjali, which he despises.

programme.title: RRR
programme.desc: Starring: N. T. Rama Rao Jr.,Ram Charan. A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

programme.title: Kerala Story
programme.desc: Kerala Story

programme.title: Bholaa
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,Sanjay Mishra. Freed after ten years, Bholaa's prison release turns into a fight to reach his daughter. Obstacles erupt at every turn, testing his resolve for a long-awaited reunion.

programme.title: Supreme Khiladi
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Dharam Tej,Raashi Khanna. The mafia's plan to seize a trust's land hits a roadblock when a brave taxi driver defends the heir, igniting a battle of courage, loyalty, and unexpected heroism.

programme.title: Deva
programme.desc: Starring: Shahid Kapoor Pooja Hegde Pavail Gulati. A dedicated police officer sets out to solve his close friend's murder, but a tragic accident erases his memory, forcing him to piece together the truth while battling his lost past.

programme.title: Bastar The Naxal Story
programme.desc: Starring: Adah Sharma,Indira Tiwari. Based on true events, the film delves into the Naxalite-Maoist insurgency in Bastar, highlighting the struggles of the tribal community.

programme.title: Pippa
programme.desc: Starring: Ishaan Khatter,Mrunal Thakur. Balram Singh Mehta, a courageous officer of the 45th Cavalry, proves his mettle on the Eastern Front, showcasing valor and patriotism during the intense Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Antim: The Final Truth
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Aayush Sharma. A poor farmer's son moves to the city and becomes a fearless gangster. Soon, he locks horns with an upright policeman who does not give up on any fight easily.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Kareena Kapoor. Pawan, a Hanuman devotee, finds a speech-impaired Pakistani girl lost in Haryana and undertakes a dangerous journey across borders to reunite her with her family with love.

programme.title: Hero The Bullet
programme.desc: Starring: Gopichand,Nayanthara. Shiva, a young man, is looked down upon by his father due to his irresponsible behaviour. He soon gets embroiled in a tussle with an egoistic gangster who threatens his family.

programme.title: Aho Vikramaarka
programme.desc: Starring: Dev Gill,Chitra Shukla. When a brutal cop discovers Asura's dark world of enslaved victims, he's pulled into a deadly war where justice isn't served-it's taken by force.

programme.title: Antony
programme.desc: Starring: Joju George,Chemban Vinod Jose. Antony, once feared as a ruthless gangster, unexpectedly becomes the guardian of Ann Maria. Their bond grows, but a dangerous enemy from his past resurfaces with deadly intent.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Starring: Tiger Shroff,Jacqueline Fernandez. Aman, a martial arts teacher, discovers his superpowers during a fight with Raka. After Raka gains strength from toxic waste, Aman must defeat him.

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: Sanam Teri Kasam

programme.title: Real Tevar
programme.desc: Starring: Aamani,Jagapathi Babu. Harsha, a millionaire's son, meets Charuseela and reaches a remote village, deciding to develop it, discovering purpose, love, responsibility, and values beyond wealth.

programme.title: Seetimaarr
programme.desc: Starring: Gopichand,Tamannaah. A bank employee and kabaddi coach aims to uplift his father's school and lead village players to national victory, but challenges abound.

programme.title: Himmatwar
programme.desc: Starring: Shruti K. Haasan,Vishal Krishna. Moneylender Vasu saves policeman Sivaraman. Catching gangster Singana Patrudu's eye, it sets off a dangerous chain of events for Vasu.

programme.title: Bairagee
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Pruthvi Ambaar. After relocating with his cop friend, Huli witnesses a shocking event. Fueled by anger and purpose, he sets out to confront injustice and make things right in an unfamiliar city.

programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey, a rebellious cop, slays a politician's brother. Retaliation ensues as the politician's henchmen target Chulbul's wife, igniting his fury.

programme.title: Amba
programme.desc: A man molests the daughter of his servant. His mother testifies against him. The enraged wife decides to avenge her husband's death.

programme.title: Humshakal
programme.desc: Ram, a poor labourer, marries Radha. One day, when their child is seriously ill, Radha arrives at her husband's place of work and is shocked to see that he is leading a dual life with another woman.

programme.title: Sharmelee
programme.desc: Captain Ajit Kapoor meets Kamini at a party and falls in love with her. However, he is taken aback when his marriage is fixed with her twin sister Kanchan.

programme.title: Apna Desh
programme.desc: When Akash attempts to expose his employer's corrupt ways, his brother is framed and arrested, and Akash must try to clear his sibling's name.

programme.title: Dadagiri
programme.desc: Singh offers to marry Deepa and for her dad's sake, Deepa agrees, and a heartbroken Dharma decides to remain single.

programme.title: Ek Shriman Ek Shrimati
programme.desc: In a love triangle, Deepali, the wealthy industrialist's daughter, finds herself torn between her feelings for Pritam and her true love, Ajit. Drama and passion ensue!

programme.title: Dulhan Wahi Jo Piya Man Bhaye
programme.desc: When Harikishan suffers a heart-attack, he reluctantly agrees to let his grandson marry Rita, who unknown to him, is a street florist.
